prompt: Add due date reminders: visual overdue/due-soon indicators on task cards, overdue filter, daily digest banner ('N tasks due today'), backend cron to mark overdue. Timezone handling (UTC storage, user-relative 'today'). No email, no custom times, no snooze. React + Zustand + Express + Prisma.

assertions.name: has_all_sections
assertions.description: Spec contains all required sections from the template

assertions.name: problem_explains_why
assertions.criteria: The Problem section explains WHY due date reminders matter (tasks silently go overdue, users miss deadlines, dueDate field is unused) — not just 'add reminders'
assertions.description: Problem section articulates motivation and impact

assertions.name: references_real_files
assertions.criteria: Technical Approach references at least 2 real files (e.g., TaskCard.tsx, types.ts, tasks.ts, taskStore.ts)

assertions.name: makes_architectural_decisions
assertions.criteria: The spec makes a concrete decision about timezone handling: where the conversion happens (client-side for display, server-side for cron), how user timezone is obtained, and how the cron handles multi-timezone users. This is stated as a decision, not an open question.

assertions.name: verification_is_testable
assertions.criteria: Verification section has specific testable behaviors including timezone edge cases (e.g., 'task due today in US timezone shows as due-soon even when UTC date is tomorrow')
assertions.description: Verification items include timezone edge cases

assertions.name: has_alternatives
assertions.criteria: Alternatives Considered section has at least one real alternative (e.g., client-only vs server cron, computed vs stored overdue status)
assertions.description: At least one substantive alternative considered

assertions.name: no_json_shapes
assertions.criteria: The spec does NOT contain verbatim Prisma schema definitions, JSON shapes, or interface definitions. Describing what fields are needed is fine; writing the exact schema is over-specification.

assertions.name: no_mechanism_tables
assertions.criteria: The spec does NOT contain exhaustive tables mapping each visual indicator to exact CSS classes, component props, or implementation wiring.
